text.title: Test Pyramid vs Testing Trophy: Per-Module Decision Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Test Pyramid vs Testing Trophy: Per-Module Decision end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: answer-5-questions
step.action: For each module answer q1..q5 in test-strategy.yaml.

step.name: map-shape
step.action: Apply mapping: pure-logic-stable → pyramid; orchestration-volatile-risky → trophy; mixed → hybrid.

step.name: baseline-runtime
step.action: Record current unit/integration/e2e seconds per module.

step.name: commit-record
step.action: Write test-strategy.yaml; assign owner; set next_review_date.
